command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
echo '' | base64 -d > /tmp/moreno_wave1_reliability.py
python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('/tmp/moreno_wave1_reliability.py').read()); print('SYNTAX OK')"
cp /tmp/moreno_wave1_reliability.py runtime/moreno_wave1_reliability.py
python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'runtime'); import moreno_wave1_reliability as w; print('IMPORT OK, version:', w.WAVE1_VERSION)"
ENDSSH
